_comment: Discord bot Application IDs allowed to message each other via the patched discord plugin. The plugin server.ts re-reads this file on every bot-to-bot inbound (no restart needed when adding peers). Find a bot's Application ID at https://discord.com/developers/applications -> your app -> General Information -> Application ID.
rateLimitNote: Per-sender hard cap to prevent runaway loops. ~1 message every 2 seconds on average; enough for normal multi-round discussion; only catches extreme spam. Tune up if discussions get throttled.
